/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/character.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/entityList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/itemlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/cave.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SU_PO_spil.dir/databaseComs.cpp.o -o SU_PO_spil  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Sql.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
